sql:
SELECT 
    a.*,

    -- ✅ STATUS SPTJM (SUDAH AMAN & BISA DIFILTER)
    CASE 
        WHEN a.sptjm_status = 'belum disetujui' AND a.sptjm_kantor = '1'
            THEN 'belum disetujui tapi sudah diterima dikantor'

        WHEN a.sptjm_status = 'belum disetujui' AND a.sptjm_kantor <> '1'
            THEN 'belum disetujui & belum diterima dikantor'

        WHEN a.sptjm_status = 'disetujui' AND a.sptjm_kantor <> '1'
            THEN 'sudah disetujui tapi belum diterima dikantor'

        WHEN a.sptjm_status = 'disetujui' AND a.sptjm_kantor = '1'
            THEN 'selesai'

        ELSE 'belum upload & belum diterima dikantor'
    END AS status_sptjm,

    -- ✅ STATUS PROSES KUNCI (LEBIH SIMPLE & CEPAT)
    CASE 
        WHEN a.jumlah - a.dikunci_kantor = 0
            THEN 'semua progres sudah selesai, terima kasih'
        ELSE 'belum selesai'
    END AS status_proses_kunci_kantor

FROM (
    SELECT
        ceklis.npsn,
        profil.`nama Madrasah` AS `NAMA SATUAN PENDIDIKAN`,
        profil.NSM,
        data_sibay.tahun,

        SUM(data_sibay.status_siswa = 'Yatim') AS yatim,
        SUM(data_sibay.status_siswa = 'Piatu') AS piatu,
        SUM(data_sibay.status_siswa = 'Yatim Piatu') AS yatim_piatu,

        COUNT(data_sibay.nisn) AS jumlah,

        SUM(data_sibay.kunci_operator <> '') AS dikunci_operator,
        SUM(data_sibay.kunci_kemenag_pidie <> '') AS dikunci_kantor,

        SUM(data_sibay.status = 'selesai') AS `selesai upload`,

        COUNT(data_sibay.nisn) - 
        SUM(CASE WHEN data_sibay.status = 'selesai' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) 
        AS `selisih belum upload`,

        SUM(data_sibay.status = 'penambahan') AS penambahan,

        profil.`tingkat madrasah`,

        -- 🔥 INI KUNCI PERBAIKAN
        MAX(sptjm.status) AS sptjm_status,
        MAX(sptjm.pertinggal_kantor) AS sptjm_kantor

    FROM ceklis

    LEFT JOIN profil 
        ON profil.NPSN = ceklis.npsn

    LEFT JOIN data_sibay 
        ON data_sibay.npsn = ceklis.npsn
        AND data_sibay.tahun = YEAR(CURDATE())

    LEFT JOIN sptjm 
        ON sptjm.npsn = data_sibay.npsn 
        AND sptjm.tahun = YEAR(CURDATE())

    GROUP BY
        ceklis.npsn,
        profil.`nama Madrasah`,
        profil.NSM,
        data_sibay.tahun,
        profil.`tingkat madrasah`
) a

ORDER BY a.jumlah DESC;
name: rekap
